prompt: A nostalgic Japanese sticker-photo style scrapbook collage on warm off-white textured paper, designed like a handwritten Heisei-era gyaru purikura page. In the upper left, large hand-drawn Japanese text in a reddish brown crayon style reads "昭和の日。" Beneath it on the left side are 5 stacked handwritten note lines with playful doodles: 1) "先負~~~" in dark gray with a pale blue wavy flourish, 2) "月齢11.6" with a yellow moon doodle, 3) "晴れ20°C" with a small orange sun, a red thermometer, and a white cloud, 4) "昭和の日" with a tiny red flag and an open book icon, 5) "畳の日" with a green tatami mat icon, followed below by "ナポリタンの日" with a fork icon. At the bottom, large handwritten reddish brown text reads "平成ギャルプリクラの落書" with an underline stroke. On the right half, place a square candid photo of a young Japanese woman sitting at a wooden café counter by a sunlit window, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She has dark brown hair in a loose messy updo with wispy strands, and wears an oversized beige knit sweater. She holds a cream soda float or pale lemon soda in a stemmed glass with ice cream on top and a red cherry, sipping through a straw while looking toward the window. The café interior is cozy and retro, with warm brown wood, soft natural afternoon light, framed wall art in the background, and a calm Showa-era kissaten atmosphere. Surround the photo with cute hand-drawn doodles in pastel chalk colors: orange sun rays from the top left corner of the photo, 3 yellow stars, 2 pink hearts, blue swirly wind lines at upper right, small green sprouts at the bottom, a simple yellow dog drawing at lower right, and leafy green accents around the page. Overall composition should feel airy, handmade, feminine, nostalgic, and casual, with imperfect marker and crayon strokes, muted earthy colors, and authentic retro Japanese purikura scrapbook energy.
